_meta.description: Read-only research agent: queries model/data/news vendors, no write privileges, no production connections. Tighter caps than the coding-agent blueprint. Control-plane only — Sanction holds no money.
_meta.amounts: DOLLARS. @sanction/sdk PolicyInput is camelCase dollars; the API stores cents internally.

enforcement.policy.blockedCategories: ENFORCED — authorize denies on exact category match
enforcement.policy.allowedCategories: NOT YET ENFORCED — documentation of intent
enforcement.policy.autoApproveUnderUsd: ENFORCED — at/under this, auto-approve and never escalate
enforcement.vault: ENFORCED — scoped 15-min JWT; read-only credential scopes

_meta.apply: Send this 'policy' block to PATCH /v1/wallets/policy with the wallet_id + x-mgmt-key (partial update; omitted fields unchanged), or apply it with the SDK's admin.applyBlueprint(). See README.md.
